L1.area: Cache management and temporary file cleanup utilities

L2.description: A path traversal vulnerability exists in a recursive file deletion routine that does not validate whether target paths remain within an allowed base directory. An attacker can supply specially crafted inputs containing directory traversal sequences to cause the deletion of arbitrary files on the system.

L3.area: Cache management and temporary file cleanup utilities
L3.description: A path traversal vulnerability exists in a recursive file deletion routine that does not validate whether target paths remain within an allowed base directory. An attacker can supply specially crafted inputs containing directory traversal sequences to cause the deletion of arbitrary files on the system.

ground_truth.reason: The recursive file deletion method accepts file paths without verifying they remain within the intended base directory, allowing directory traversal sequences to delete arbitrary files on the system.
